t.name: description
t.value: Returns true if the given condition either has no verification status or has a verification status of confirmed, unconfirmed, provisional, or differential

t.name: description
t.value: Excludes encounters of patients with cancer pain or who are receiving palliative or hospice care at the time of the encounter or who receive treatment for opioid use disorder, have sickle cell disease, or who are discharged to another inpatient care facility or discharged against medical advice, or expire during the inpatient stay.
